zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Swynhowe於1378年出生在英國英格蘭安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，她的父親Sir William d'Isney IV65歲，母親Mary de Grey39歲。她於1412年與John Bradford在英國英格蘭安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1429年11月12日在她的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Swynhowe于1378年出生在英国英格兰安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋时，她的父亲Sir William d'Isney IV65岁，母亲Mary de Grey39岁。她于1412年与John Bradford在英国英格兰安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1429年11月12日在她的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Swynhowe was born in 1378, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William d'Isney IV, was 65 and her mother, Mary de Grey, was 39. She married John Bradford in 1412, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 12 November 1429, in her hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Leicester, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Swynhowe est née en 1378, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William d'Isney IV, avait 65 ans et sa mère, Mary de Grey, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé John Bradford en 1412, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 12 novembre 1429, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Swynhoweが1378年にイギリスイギリストイン アンド ウエアルニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた時，父Sir William d'Isney IVは65歳，母Mary de Greyは39歳であった。1412年にイギリスイギリストイン アンド ウエアルニューカストル ウプオン トインでJohn Bradfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1429年11月12日に故郷で51歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Swynhowe(이)가 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William d'Isney IV(은)는 65세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary de Grey(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 John Bradford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1429년 11월 12일 그녀의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Swynhowe nasceu em 1378, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William d'Isney IV, tinha 65 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Grey, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com John Bradford em 1412, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1429, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Engl: нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Swynhowe родилась в 1378 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William d'Isney IV было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Grey, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bradford в 1412 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 12 ноября 1429 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Swynhowe nació en 1378, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William d'Isney IV, tenía 65 años y su mamá, Mary de Grey, tenía 39 años. Se casó con John Bradford en 1412, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1429, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
